summary: First-finish smoke test of This Moment Studio MVP. Backend API (health, POST/GET /api/bookings, validation) and frontend (homepage, hero, navigation, booking form happy path, contact links, mobile toggle) all working end-to-end. Booking is persisted to MongoDB and returned via list endpoint.
passed: POST /api/bookings happy path returns 200 with uuid id, status:'new', ISO created_at
GET /api/bookings returns list sorted by created_at desc; newly created booking is first
Frontend loads with title 'This Moment Studio — Live shows. Private events. Unforgettable moments.'
Nav links Experience, Services, Gallery, Shows, Book present; nav-cta-book present
All booking form data-testid inputs present (name, email, phone, event_type, event_date, message, submit)
Booking form happy path: fill all fields -> POST succeeds -> booking-success card with 'Thank you' shown
Successful submission persisted to Mongo (verified via GET /api/bookings — record 6ed69b96-... present)
Contact phone href = tel:+15863394701, email href = mailto:hello@thismoment.studio
Mobile viewport 375x812: nav-mobile-toggle visible & opens mobile menu with all sections + Book an Event CTA
notes: Empty-form submit: sonner toast text 'Please complete all required fields' was not detected in DOM query, but form did NOT submit (browser-native HTML5 'required' validation blocks submission before JS toast fires). Behavior is correct — invalid submissions are prevented.
3D canvas rendered fine in headless Chromium; no blocking WebGL errors observed.
